All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

T

TextIOUtils - Class in timgutilities.textio
This class represents a bunch of utility functions that over the years I have found myself having to repeatedly write, so I basically took my usual code and put it here.
TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE - Enum Class in timgutilities.textio
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
timgutilities.textio - package timgutilities.textio
 
toFourDigit(int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Converts a number to a minimum of four digits in the resulting string
toggleSelected() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
toggles the selected flag between true / false, if it is true then (*) will be included in the text string generated to describe this choice.
toString() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
 
toString() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
generates the list of options as a string If not already done triggers the process of handling sort, adding abandons etc, and makes the list read only.
toTwoDigit(int) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Converts a number to a minimum of two digits in the resulting string
